metadata.description: Shared Claude Code skills for the ObserveOps / Design System team.

plugins.name: publish
plugins.description: Push your project to GitHub and deploy it live on GitHub Pages, then return the shareable URL.

plugins.name: tata
plugins.description: Tata! Heading out? Save session context to CLAUDE.md + HANDOFF.md. Default does not publish; run '/tata publish' to save AND go live in one step.
